mapper.select:
SELECT bre.supplier, bre.time, bre.number, goods.name, goods.spec, bre_info.attr, bre_info.unit, bre_info.warehouse, bre_info.price, bre_info.nums, bre_info.discount, bre_info.dsc, bre_info.total, bre_info.tax, bre_info.tat, bre_info.tpt, bre_info.data, bre.total as bTotal, bre.cost, bre.actual, bre_bill.money, bre.account, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoice inv WHERE bre.source=inv.class ),0) as nums2, bre.people, bre.logistics, bre.data as data2 FROM bre INNER JOIN bre_info on bre.id=bre_info.pid INNER JOIN goods on bre_info.goods=goods.id INNER JOIN bre_bill on bre.source=bre_bill.pid
bre.id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY bre.time DESC
